sections.title: By the entrance of the Chasm of Fire

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Welcome. Have you come to give your soul to the Chasm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I believe I'm still using it.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: For now. Have you came to prove yourself in combat against the many demons within the Chasm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Perhaps.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: My master prefers that his minions be killed with purpose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Purpose?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: I ask no questions of my master, I just inform.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: I am not worthy to explain on his behalf. Descend the Chasm and speak with him yourself if you wish for further details.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: As outlined in your contract, he wishes them slain in particular ways.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you remind me what ways those were?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Death by two-handed melee weapons, heavy ranged weapons, magic spells, special attacks, and defeating them whilst bound.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Additionaly, he will request a specific method to be used. If you comply, your chances of obtaining a reward will be increased.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Currently, my master wishes for you to use two handed melee weapons to kill his minions.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Currently, my master wishes for you to use heavy ranged weapons to kill his minions.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Currently, my master wishes for you to use spells to kill his minions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does that include powered staves?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Currently, my master wishes for you to use special attacks to kill his minions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kinds of rewards would I receive?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Special contracts, to be presented to my master for further discussion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: You are most welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Oh yes! Just praying to my new master. It's hot down here, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your new master, that would be...?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Yama! I sold my soul you see, well, I guess that Ox-headed guy down there forcibly removed it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound like a fair trade...

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Oh, don't worry, I'm perfectly fine with the outcome. Sure, the loss of vision is a shame but it could be worse.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could it?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Underground there are no tall buildings, I'm awfully afraid of heights, you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps it's a good thing you can't see...

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, nothing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to your eyes?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: The ritual, there were some... adverse effects...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The ritual?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Oh yes! Pretty basic really, head of an Ox, bruma roots, lots of fire and of course the human sacrifice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And at what point did that blind you?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: The voice demanded that we stare into the fire until we saw enlightenment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess the fire was pretty bright.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Blindingly so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait! Did you say human sacrifice?

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Why, of course! We're Zamorakians, we're evil...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I guess that's true.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: So soon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, the demons won't slay themselves.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: What demons?

sections.title: By the entrance of the Chasm of Fire

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: Welcome. Have you come to give your soul to the Chasm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I believe I'm still using it.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: For now. Have you come to prove yourself in combat against the many demons within the Chasm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Perhaps.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: My master wishes you not to kill his minions without an agenda. You may only slay within the Chasm that which you have been assigned by a Slayer Master.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's an oddly specific reason.

lines.speaker: Disciple of Yama
lines.text: I ask no questions of my master, I just inform.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: The Disciple
lines.text: My master wishes you not to kill his minions without an agenda. You may only slay within the Chasm that which you have been assigned by a Slayer Master.
